PushEvent:yasyf/fusekit.summary: added a generic Supervisor/Policy for detached children and a stable-path mount holder with peer-gated kill

PushEvent:yasyf/yclaw.summary: hardened the hermes-agent home server: a gVisor runtime, a filtering docker socket proxy, and tailnet-only firewalls

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-squash.summary: scaffolded cc_squash and laid out the compaction research, architecture, and build plan

PushEvent:yasyf/homebrew-tap.summary: published the latest cask and formula bumps across the cc-* tools

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-orchestrate.summary: added a /cco plugin and AgentProber liveness across the tmux, zellij, and superset backends

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-notes.summary: added a ccn alias and made the plugin auto-install the binary on first session

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-skills.summary: taught the repo-bootstrap skill to adopt cc-context (ccx) and documented the new plugins

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-context.summary: built ccx, a compact codebase-context facade over semble + tilth, with lazy engine startup

PushEvent:yasyf/captain-hook.summary: added on-demand pack fetching (@latest, daily refresh) and a shared review correction ledger

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-pool.summary: hardened the overlay's fuse→symlink retreat and kept the macOS Network Volumes grant across upgrades

cc-notes@v0.7.8.summary: auto-installs the cc-notes binary on first session and adds the ccn alias

cc-context@v0.1.1.summary: cleared the S1–S7 acceptance-test findings and rewrote the ccx README

cc-pool@v0.31.8.summary: swept orphaned shared overlay entries into base on the fuse→symlink retreat

captain-hook@v3.12.0.summary: fetch declared packs on demand — @latest, daily refresh, frozen tags at add time

slop-cop@v0.1.20.summary: added golangci-lint v2 lint and vuln jobs and cleared the lint debt

spawnllm@v0.3.1.summary: threaded cwd and timeout through the call() entrypoint
